full_text:
Zhuge Jian (Qicen) 諸葛建 (起岑)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Jian (諸葛建), styledQicen (起岑). Third son of Zhuge Ke. Killed in the downfall of his father. Zhuge Jian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhuge Jian lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
